description:
Hi District IT,

The FinishLynx timing laptop won't connect to the finish-line gate at the Crestwood track. The camera shows up but the software can't see the gate over the network cable, so we can't capture finishes. We have a home meet this week.

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: FinishLynx laptop won't connect to timing gate

description:
Hi District IT,

The scoreboard controller at the track/field area won't pair with the new console. The display powers on but stays blank and the controller's pairing light keeps blinking. Can someone help us get it linked before Friday?

Thanks,
Demetrius Washington
Assistant Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Scoreboard controller not pairing with console

description:
Hi District IT,

A few of our coaches' Hudl accounts are locked out after the start-of-season password reset. We need access restored so we can upload and share film with athletes. Can you unlock the athletic-department accounts?

Thanks,
Yolanda Pruitt
Athletic Director, Crestwood
subject: Hudl coach accounts locked out

description:
Hi District IT,

The athletic-department laptop I use at meets won't join the district WiFi anymore. It just says it can't authenticate. It worked last week. Asset tag CHS-AD-114.

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Athletics laptop won't join district WiFi

description:
Hi District IT,

I'm trying to print the heat sheets for the Crestwood Cross Country Invitational from the Athletic.net export, but the formatting breaks and pages cut off on the athletics printer. Can you help me get a clean print run?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Heat sheets won't print correctly

description:
Hi District IT,

The gym projector we use for film sessions won't display from the laptop. It powers on but shows 'no signal' on both HDMI inputs. We have film review scheduled with the team tomorrow morning.

Thanks,
Greg Halloran
Booster / AV Volunteer, Crestwood
subject: Gym projector shows no signal for film session

description:
Hi District IT,

Could you enable an additional coach login on the online eligibility/roster system for our new assistant? We also need to bulk-import the spring track roster. Is that something the helpdesk can set up?

Thanks,
Demetrius Washington
Assistant Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Add coach login and import roster in eligibility system

description:
Hi District IT,

The wireless transponder timing system keeps losing connection to the finish gate intermittently at practice. It worked fine last season. Could a firmware update be needed on the transponders or the gate receiver?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Transponder timing system dropping connection

description:
Hi District IT,

We need to set up a shared athletics calendar and confirm the team email distribution list is current for the track program. A couple of coaches say they aren't receiving the group emails.

Thanks,
Yolanda Pruitt
Athletic Director, Crestwood
subject: Team email distribution list missing members

description:
Hi District IT,

The district-issued iPad for the track team won't finish MDM enrollment. It gets stuck on the 'Remote Management' screen and won't load our coaching apps. Serial is on the back of the case.

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Track team iPad stuck on MDM enrollment

description:
Hi District IT,

The Hudl mobile app crashes whenever I try to upload sprint film from the field. It worked on the old phone. I've reinstalled it twice with no change. District-managed device.

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Hudl app crashes on film upload

description:
Hi District IT,

The scoreboard at our field is showing the wrong event and won't reset between heats from the console. We have to power-cycle it each time. Can someone check the controller config before our next meet?

Thanks,
Demetrius Washington
Assistant Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Scoreboard won't reset between heats

description:
Hi District IT,

Can you confirm whether our athletic-department printing quota covers meet programs and heat sheets for the season? We hit a limit last week and couldn't print. Need this sorted before the indoor meets.

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Athletics print quota question

description:
Hi District IT,

The weight-room TV mount is loose and the display keeps losing power, and the audio for our strength sessions cuts out. Is this something the AV team can come look at? It's the wall display by the squat racks.

Thanks,
Greg Halloran
Booster / AV Volunteer, Crestwood
subject: Weight-room TV mount loose and audio cutting out

description:
Hi District IT,

The online meet registration on Athletic.net rejected our entries for the regional and now the roster shows errors. The system says athletes aren't 'verified' but they passed eligibility. How do I fix this before the entry deadline?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Meet registration error on roster verification

description:
Hi District IT,

Quick question before our next meet: which timing-software version are we supposed to be running on the meet laptop, and is there an update I should install for the new finish-gate firmware? Want to avoid surprises on meet day.

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Which timing software version for meet laptop?

description:
Hi District IT,

We're hosting a district track meet and need a couple of guest WiFi accounts and a check on the press-box network drop for the timing and scoreboard feeds. Can you confirm what's available and the setup hours?

Thanks,
Yolanda Pruitt
Athletic Director, Crestwood
subject: Guest WiFi and press-box network for hosted meet

description:
Hi District IT,

The public-address / starter audio system at the track is cutting in and out, and the starter's mic has heavy static. It made the last meet hard to run. Can the AV/sound team take a look?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Track PA and starter audio cutting out

description:
Hi District IT,

The film-room display won't load Hudl clips for our review session, it just shows a spinning wheel and then an error. The internet in that room seems slow. We've got an athlete meeting scheduled and need it working.

Thanks,
Demetrius Washington
Assistant Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Film-room display won't load Hudl clips

description:
Hi District IT,

The district-issued stopwatches/transponders we got for the team came pre-loaded with the wrong meet profile and won't sync to our gate. Looks like a firmware/config mismatch. How do we get them reflashed correctly?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood
subject: Transponders loaded with wrong meet profile
